issues.title: Device Request - Human presence sensor - Wenzhou Wenzhi Automation  [ _TZ321C_fkzihax8 ] / Zigbee 5.8G Radar [ TS0225 ]

prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Human Presence Sensor**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ321C_fkzihax8`
   - **User:** NoroddH
   - **Status:** Open
   - **Link:** [Issue #1270](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1270)

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
1. **Plug Energy Monitor**
   - **Fingerprints:**
     - `_TZ3210_w0qqde0g` (Driver: `plug_energy_monitor`)
     - `_TZ3210_xzhnra8x` (Driver: `plug_energy_monitor`)
   - **Issue:** [#137](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/137) (Closed)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the current analysis.
